subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of grandeur, from the luminous and exalted Tree - verily, there is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد ان استمع الندآء من شطر الکبریاء من السدره المرتفعه النورآء انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
